newsItems.title: Athletics fire pitching coach Scott Emerson amid 9-game slide
newsItems.note: The Athletics, who have a nine-game losing streak, have fired pitching coach Scott Emerson, with bullpen coach Dan Hubbs taking over on an interim basis.
